description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a round neck, short raglan sleeves, adidas patented 3-Stripes running from the shoulder to the sleeves, embroidered branding on the right chest and team badge applqued on the left chest over a red and black stripeFittingRegularWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decoartionsLook good, stay comfortable in ease in this sporty Milan soccer team T-shirt from adidas. This tee is crafted from soft polycot to offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans, tracks or shorts and sneakers.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 6'1', Shoulders: 18.5"
